SELECT toDate32OrNull(date_string) AS converted_date FROM test_dates WHERE converted_date IS NOT NULL;
SELECT toDate32OrNull(date_string) AS converted_date, COUNT(*) FROM test_dates GROUP BY converted_date;
SELECT a.date_col FROM another_test_dates AS a JOIN test_dates AS b ON toDate32OrNull(b.date_string) = a.date_col;
WITH (SELECT toDate32OrNull('1955-01-01')) AS valid_date SELECT valid_date + INTERVAL 10 YEAR AS future_date;
